title: barce's vanilla experience
description: A Vanilla+ Modpack aimed at improving performance and aesthetics while maintaining the intended look of Minecraft
body: # A Vanilla+ Modpack aimed at improving performance and aesthetics while maintaining the intended look of Minecraft. ## - ⚡**Optimization and Performance Mods** - Sodium - DynamicFPS - BetterBlockEntities - Voxy - 🌱**Quality of Life** - Click through Item Frames and Signs to access Chests - Inventory Sorting **&** Item Scrolling - Shulker Box Tooltips - __Singleplayer World Hosting__ - Allow others to join your Singleplayer worlds, Modpack not required! - No Telemetry - Better Book & Quill writing - Large Text on signs - ⚒️**Building Utilities** - Load schematics via [Litematica](https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica) - Quick Item and Block Swapping using [ItemSwapper](https://modrinth.com/mod/itemswapper) - Enhanced Creative Building with [Axiom](https://modrinth.com/mod/axiom) - 😎**Aesthetic and Visual** - A prettier night sky, with constellations and flickering stars - Elytra Contrails - Works in Multiplayer with other player's customized contrail! - Unique sky and fog colors for every biome - Fluffier clouds **And lots of other minor tweaks and additions!** # 🚧 Under construction!
